concept: Process / Unfolding Sequence / Method in Action
description: To carry something through a series of actions or steps toward an end; to unfold a method through time. 'Teru' names what happens between beginning and completion, the journey of transformation.
sound_symbolism: The word moves through stages. 'Te' touches with each step taken, stages progressing. 'Ru' runs with continuous flow, process unfolding.
grammatical_notes: 'mia teru.' (I process.) The noun, 'teru' (the process), is the event-noun rule at work. Related to 'norae' (method) as practice to pattern.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Democratic process—collective decision-making that honors all voices.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Process over outcome—valuing the journey of transformation, not grasping at results.
